prompt: We're not tracking checkout completions at all yet, but I want to A/B test a new green checkout button against the current one. Can you set up the event tracking, a conversion metric off it, and draft the experiment splitting traffic evenly? Don't start it — I'll review the diff first.
note: the real chain: register event -> define metric on it -> draft experiment referencing it. Stays a DRAFT (skill rule: never auto-start).

prompt: The checkout-button experiment looks good — go ahead and start it.
note: start is the explicit, separate step after review

prompt: How's the checkout-button experiment doing — has the difference reached significance yet?
note: reading significance must not mutate the experiment
